title: alchemilla vulgaris f. rubristipula
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris f. rubristipula, also known as lady's mantle, is a perennial flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Europe. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and astringent qualities. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris f. rubristipula include soothing digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
